sections.title: Short title, extent and commencement
sections.content: This Act may be called the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988. It extends to the whole of India. It shall come into force on such date as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint; and different dates may be appointed for different States and any reference in this Act to the commencement of this Act shall, in relation to a State, be construed as a reference to the commencement of this Act in that State.

sections.title: Definitions
sections.content: [PLACEHOLDER — Update with definitions. Key terms include: 'motor vehicle', 'transport vehicle', 'driving licence', 'permit', 'owner', 'public service vehicle', 'goods carriage', 'fitness certificate', 'registering authority'.]
